message:
fix(runtime): properly handle uncaught exceptions in modules

For ES6 modules, call js_std_await() on the result of JS_EvalFunction()
to properly handle exceptions. This matches what QuickJS's
js_std_eval_binary does.

Without this fix, uncaught exceptions in modules would be silently
swallowed, causing the program to exit with code 0 instead of reporting
the error and exiting with code 1.
